meaning: n.档案,公文,档案室,案卷保管处
examples: He has been digging into the local archives.
The BBC's archives are bulging with material.
The picture lay hidden in the archives for over 40 years.
The Wellcome Trust is currently involved in a conservation project with the Royal Scottish National Hospital (RSNH) archives.
Clinton's opponents were quick to predict that the flap over the archives would dent her claim to electability.
